message:
feat(extras): add composable effect chains for text effects (bd-3aa3)

StyledText now supports multiple effects via Vec<TextEffect>:
- effect() adds single effect, effects() adds batch
- clear_effects() removes all, effect_count()/has_effects() for querying
- char_color() blends/multiplies effects by category
- char_at() uses first-wins for character-modifying effects
- MAX_EFFECTS=8 caps chain length

Added 9 unit tests for backwards compat, blending, alpha multiply,
determinism, clear effects, empty vec, max enforcement, batch add,
and None filtering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
